description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a dark reddish-brown barrel and a lighter, worn handle. The barrel is embedded with several large, protruding metal nails, giving it a rugged and menacing appearance. The wood shows signs of wear and discoloration, especially toward the handle, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. The nails are irregularly spaced and stick out at various angles, adding to the bat's aggressive look. There are no visible brand logos, grip tape, or decorative markings on the bat. The end cap is simply the rounded end of the wood, with no distinct design or material difference.
description: A worn wooden baseball bat with a dark barrel embedded with protruding metal nails and a lighter, weathered handle. The bat has a rugged, menacing appearance with no visible logos or grip tape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark barrel with several nails protruding from the left side and a lighter, worn handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the bat and the nails sticking out more prominently from the right side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the barrel with nails visible on both sides and the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with nails protruding from the left, showing the bat's rounded end and the transition from dark to light wood.
